text:
(In reply to Roman Bogorodskiy from comment #1)

I see that now. :)

Do you know if anyone is working on porting the adblock library that upstream added support for with 2.x https://github.com/ArniDagur/python-adblock if not I can try and take a stab at it once I figure out the correct category for such a thing.
